ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set February 20, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
